debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

      <;> omega
    have h₃ : Vector.size args = w := by simp [Vector.size]

  have h₅ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := by

    apply h₃
    simpa [h₆] using ZMod.val_one (by assumption)

    have h₇ : (1 : ZMod p) - args[i] ≠ 0 := by

        simp_all [sub_eq_zero]

    cases h₁₀ with

have h₁ : (assert_bit_e (args[i]) cs).eval = .n := by
    have h₂ : ¬args[i] = 0 := h'
    have h₃ : ¬args[i] = 1 := h''
    simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
    have h₄ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - args[i]) ≠ 0 := by
      haveI := Fact.mk (by
        have := Nat.Prime.ne_zero (Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p))
        tauto)
      have h₅ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₅
        apply h₂
        simpa [h₅] using h₅
      have h₆ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := by
        intro h₆
        apply h₃
        simpa [h₆] using h₆
      intro h₇
      have h₈ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - args[i]) = 0 := h₇
      have h₉ : (1 - args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := by
        simpa [sub_eq_zero, mul_eq_mul_left_iff, h₅] using
          (eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero (by simpa using h₈))
      cases h₉ with
      | inl h₉ =>
        have h₁₀ : (1 : ZMod p) = args[i] := by
          have h₁₁ : (1 - args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := h₉
          have h₁₂ : (1 : ZMod p) = args[i] := by
            rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₁₁
            exact h₁₁
          exact h₁₂
        apply h₆
        simpa using h₁₀
      | inr h₉ =>
        have h₁₀ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := h₉
        apply h₂
        simpa using h₁₀
    simp [h₄, denotation]
  have h₂ : (assert_bits_e (Vector.ofElems (args.erase i)) (∀ (x : ℕ), x < (w - 1 : ℕ) → True) (assert_bit_e (args[i]) cs)).eval = .n := by
    sorry
  sorry

have h₂ : ¬(args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) = 0 := by simpa using h'
  have h₃ : ¬(args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) = 1 := by simpa using h''
  have h₄ : (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₄
    apply h₂
    exact h₄
  have h₅ : (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := by
    intro h₅
    apply h₃
    exact h₅
  have h₆ : (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) * (1 - (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p)) ≠ 0 := by
    haveI : Fact (Nat.Prime p) := ‹_›
    have h₆₁ : (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := h₄
    have h₆₂ : (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := h₅
    have h₆₃ : (1 : ZMod p) - (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₆₃
      have h₆₄ : (1 : ZMod p) = (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) := by
        rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₆₃
        exact h₆₃
      apply h₆₂
      exact h₆₄.symm
    have h₆₄ : (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) * (1 - (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p)) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₆₄
      have h₆₅ : (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (1 : ZMod p) - (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) = 0 := by
        simp_all [mul_eq_mul_left_iff, sub_eq_zero]
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try aesop)
      cases h₆₅ with
      | inl h₆₅ =>
        apply h₆₁
        exact h₆₅
      | inr h₆₅ =>
        apply h₆₃
        exact h₆₅
    exact h₆₄
  have h₇ : (Exp.eval ( (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) * (1 - (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p))) : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
    simpa [Exp.eval, zpow_one] using h₆
  have h₈ : (assert_bit_e cs (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p)).eval = .n := by
    have h₈₁ : (Exp.eval ( (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p) * (1 - (args.get ⟨i, h₁⟩ : ZMod p))) : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := h₇
    simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h₈₁]
  simp_all [Vector.getEqGet]
  <;>
  (try omega) <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try aesop)

have h₁ : ¬args[i] = 0 := by tauto
  have h₂ : ¬args[i] = 1 := by tauto
  have h₃ : (assert_bit_e (args[i]) cs).eval = .n := by
    simp [Cs.eval, assert_bit_e, Exp.eval]
    have h₄ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₄
      apply h₁
      simpa using h₄
    have h₅ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h₄
      apply h₂
      simpa using h₄
    have h₆ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h₆
      have h₇ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := h₆
      have h₈ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := by
        apply eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero h₇
      cases h₈ with
      | inl h₈ =>
        exfalso

      | inr h₈ =>
        have h₉ : (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := h₈

          have h₁₁ : (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := h₈

            have h₁₃ : (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := h₈
            have h₁₄ : (1 : ZMod p) - (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := h₁₃
            have h₁₅ : (1 : ZMod p) = (args[i] : ZMod p) := by
              rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₁₄

          have h₁₇ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 1 := by
            rw [← h₁₆]
            <;> simp [sub_eq_zero]
          exact h₁₇
        exfalso
        apply h₅
        simpa using h₁₀
    simp [h₆, Option.get]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [denotation]
    <;> aesop

    (try aesop) <;>
    (try {

      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>

      (try omega)
    }) <;>
    (try {
      rcases i with (_ | _ | i) <;>
      simp_all [Vector.get, Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, denotation]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try norm_num at *) <;>
      (try simp_all [ZMod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]) <;>

    <;>

      (try simp_all [ZMod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]) <;>

  simp_all [denotation]

  (try contradiction)
  <;>

  (try simp_all [ZMod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]) <;>
  (try omega)
  <;>

have h₂ : ¬(args[i] = 0) := by simpa using h'
  have h₃ : ¬(args[i] = 1) := by simpa using h''
  -- We need to show that (assert_bit_e args[0..i] cs).eval = .n
  -- Since args[i] is not 0 or 1, the term args[i] * (1 - args[i]) ≠ 0
  -- Therefore, (cs)).eval = .n
  simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h₁]
  have h₄ : (Exp.eval (Exp.v (Vector.get args h₁) * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v (Vector.get args h₁)))) ≠ 0 := by
    have h₅ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₅
      apply h₂
      simp [h₅]
    have h₆ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h₆
      apply h₃
      simp [h₆]
    haveI : Fact (Nat.Prime p) := ‹Fact (Nat.Prime p)›
    have h₇ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) - 1 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₇
      apply h₆
      have h₈ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 1 := by
        have h₉ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) - 1 = 0 := h₇
        have h₁₀ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 1 := by
          rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₉
          exact h₉
        exact h₁₀
      exact h₈
    have h₈ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) * ((1 : ZMod p) - (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p)) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₈
      have h₉ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (1 : ZMod p) - (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 0 := by
        have h₁₀ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) * ((1 : ZMod p) - (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p)) = 0 := h₈
        have h₁₁ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (1 : ZMod p) - (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 0 := by
          apply eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero h₁₀
        exact h₁₁
      cases h₉ with
      | inl h₉ =>
        have h₁₀ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 0 := h₉
        have h₁₁ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := h₅
        contradiction
      | inr h₉ =>
        have h₁₀ : (1 : ZMod p) - (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 0 := h₉
        have h₁₁ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) - 1 = 0 := by
          rw [←sub_eq_zero]
          have h₁₂ : (1 : ZMod p) - (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 0 := h₁₀
          rw [h₁₂]
          simp
        have h₁₂ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) - 1 = 0 := h₁₁
        have h₁₃ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 1 := by
          have h₁₄ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) - 1 = 0 := h₁₁
          have h₁₅ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) = 1 := by
            rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₁₄
            exact h₁₄
          exact h₁₅
        have h₁₄ : (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := h₆
        contradiction
    have h₉ : (Exp.eval (Exp.v (Vector.get args h₁) * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v (Vector.get args h₁)))) ≠ 0 := by
      have h₁₀ : (Exp.eval (Exp.v (Vector.get args h₁) * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v (Vector.get args h₁)))) = (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p) * (1 - (Vector.get args h₁ : ZMod p)) := by
        simp [Exp.eval_mul, Exp.eval_sub, Exp.eval_one, Exp.eval_v]
        <;> ring_nf
      rw [h₁₀]
      exact h₈
    exact h₉
  -- Since exp.eval ≠ 0, the else branch is taken and cs.eval is .n
  have h₅ : (if Exp.eval (Exp.v (Vector.get args h₁) * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v (Vector.get args h₁))) = 0 then eval cs else denotation.n : denotation (ZMod p)) = denotation.n := by
    simp [h₄]
  simp_all [h₁]

have h₂ : args[i] ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₂
    apply h'
    simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
  have h₃ : args[i] ≠ 1 := by
    intro h₃
    apply h''
    simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
  have h₄ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) ≠ 0 := by
    haveI := Fact.mk (by
      -- Prove that p is prime to use properties of ZMod p
      exact Nat.prime_iff_prime_int.mp (Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p))
    )
    have h₅ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₅
      apply h₂
      simpa using h₅
    have h₆ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h₆
      apply h₃
      simpa using h₆
    have h₇ : (1 : ZMod p) - (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₇
      have h₈ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 1 := by
        have h₉ : (1 : ZMod p) - (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := by simpa using h₇
        have h₁₀ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 1 := by
          apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero
          simpa using h₉
        exact h₁₀
      contradiction
    have h₈ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₈
      have h₉ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := by
        apply eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero h₈
      cases h₉ with
      | inl h₉ =>
        have h₁₀ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := by simpa using h₉
        contradiction
      | inr h₉ =>
        have h₁₀ : (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := by simpa using h₉
        have h₁₁ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 1 := by
          have h₁₂ : (1 : ZMod p) - (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := by simpa using h₁₀
          have h₁₃ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 1 := by
            apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero
            simpa using h₁₂
          exact h₁₃
        contradiction
    exact h₈
  have h₅ : (assert_bit_e (args[i]) cs).eval = .n := by
    simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h₄]
    <;> aesop
  simp_all [assert_bit_e, Vector.foldl, Cs.eval, denotation.n]
  <;> aesop

simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
  <;>
    (try cases p <;> simp_all [Fact.out, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      cases p with
      | zero => contradiction
      | succ p =>
        simp_all [Fact.out, ZMod.nat_cast_self]
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
        <;>
        (try omega)
    })

have h₂ : ¬args[i] = 0 := by assumption
  have h₃ : ¬args[i] = 1 := by assumption
  have h₄ : p ≥ 2 := (Nat.Prime.one_lt (Fact.out (p := p))).le
  have h₅ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₅
    apply h₂
    simpa [h₅] using h₅
  have h₆ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := by
    intro h₆
    apply h₃
    simpa [h₆] using h₆
  have h₇ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₇
    have h₈ : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := h₅
    have h₉ : (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₉
      have h₁₀ : (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := h₉
      have h₁₁ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 1 := by
        have h₁₂ : (1 : ZMod p) - (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := h₁₀
        have h₁₃ : (1 : ZMod p) = (args[i] : ZMod p) := by
          calc
            (1 : ZMod p) = (1 : ZMod p) - (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) := by simp [h₁₂]
            _ = (args[i] : ZMod p) := by simp [sub_self]
        simpa using h₁₃.symm
      contradiction
    have h₁₀ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - (args[i] : ZMod p)) = 0 := h₇
    simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
    <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₁₁ : p ≥ 2 := (Nat.Prime.one_lt (Fact.out (p := p))).le
        contradiction
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        simp_all (config := {decide := true})
        <;>
        contradiction
      })
  simp [assert_bit_e, cs, Cs.eval, h₇]
  <;>
  simp_all (config := {decide := true})
  <;>
  norm_num
  <;>
  simp_all (config := {decide := true})
  <;>
  contradiction

have h₁ : ¬args[i] = 0 := h'
  have h₂ : ¬args[i] = 1 := h''
  simp [assert_bit_e, assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, Exp.eval]
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try {
    cases p <;>
    simp_all [ZMod, Nat.Prime, Fact.out, Fin.ext_iff, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] <;>
    norm_num <;>
    aesop
  }) <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [ZMod, Nat.Prime, Fact.out, Fin.ext_iff, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] <;>
    norm_num <;>
    aesop
  }) <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [ZMod, Nat.Prime, Fact.out, Fin.ext_iff, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] <;>
    norm_num <;>
    aesop
  }) <;>
  simp_all [ZMod, Nat.Prime, Fact.out, Fin.ext_iff, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] <;>
  norm_num <;>
  aesop

<;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try simp_all [Exp.eval]) <;>
  (try {
    cases h : (i : ℕ) < w <;> simp_all [Vector.get]
  }) <;>
  (try {
    have h₁ : (i : ℕ) < w := by assumption
    simp_all [Vector.get]
  }) <;>
  (try {
    have h₁ : (i : ℕ) < w := by assumption
    simp_all [Vector.get]
  })
  <;>
  (try omega) <;>
  (try {
    have h₁ : (i : ℕ) < w := by assumption
    simp_all [Vector.get]
  })
  <;>
  (try contradiction)
  <;>
  (try simp_all [Exp.eval])
  <;>
  (try {
    have h₁ : (i : ℕ) < w := by assumption
    simp_all [Vector.get]
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [Vector.get]
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [Vector.get]
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [Vector.get]
  })

have h₃ : (args[i]) ≠ 0 := by simpa using h₁
  have h₄ : (args[i]) ≠ 1 := by simpa using h₂
  have h₅ : (assert_bit_e (args[i]) cs).eval = .n := by
    simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, if_neg, h₃, h₄, add_assoc]
    <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try simp_all) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf at *) <;>
    (try field_simp at *) <;>
    (try simp_all [h₃, h₄]) <;>
    (try aesop)
  simp_all [Vector.foldl]
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try simp_all) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try ring_nf at *) <;>
  (try aesop)
